nodes.label: Polars-native indicator functions. Each add_* takes (df, config) → df + new cols
Wilder ATR + close-normalized ATR. MUST RUN FIRST.
Wilder ADX — trend strength from +DI/-DI convergence.
Percent-change slope of EMA over shift window.
Rolling ATR rank — relative volatility within lookback.
Bollinger %B: position within band [0,1], outside = overextension.
Close / SMA ratio for each configured SMA period.
ATR-normalized distance from EMA89 — overextension signal.
Position within prior day R1-S1 range, clipped [0,1].
Candle structure: body/wick ratios, gap, consecutive bars, price position.
Session VWAP anchored to 5PM NY open.
ATR-normalized distance from VWAP — session-anchored overextension.
Fused: session dummies + day of week. Single timezone conversion.
Lag-1 of key indicators. Trees need explicit temporal lags.
EMA slope sign × ADX level → -2..2 scale.
Composite: ADX signal × EMA slope sign, clipped [0, clip_max].
